store.name: presque.cool
store.tagline: Games, tools, and generative art built with curiosity.

apps.name: A Flower A Day
apps.subtitle: A unique watercolor flower, every day
apps.description: Procedural flower generator with a watercolor aesthetic. Every day, a unique monochromatic flower is born from the date.
apps.longDescription: A Flower A Day is a procedural flower generator with a watercolor aesthetic. Every day, a unique monochromatic flower is born from the date. Watch generative petals bloom in soft, organic shapes that change daily. Save and share your favorite compositions.
features: Daily unique flower seeded by date

apps.name: Adulthood Simulator
apps.subtitle: The infinite to-do list of adult life
apps.description: A satirical infinite to-do list app simulating the burden of adult life.
apps.longDescription: Adulthood Simulator is a satirical infinite to-do list where tasks multiply faster than you can check them off. Every completed task spawns new ones. There is no winning, only coping. A darkly humorous take on modern life.
features: Infinite to-do list: each completed task generates a new one
Satirical task pool with realistic adult responsibilities
Task completion counter and score tracking

apps.name: Caravan of Sidonia
apps.subtitle: Procedural parallax landscape generator
apps.description: A procedural parallax landscape generator. Click to explore new worlds.
apps.longDescription: Caravan of Sidonia is a procedural parallax landscape generator. Each click reveals a new world with layered scenery, shifting horizons, and unique color palettes. Explore an endless caravan of generated landscapes, save your favorites, and share them via URL.
features: Procedural mountain, sky, star, meteor, and sun generation

apps.name: Cosmographe
apps.subtitle: Draw constellations on a seed-based star field
apps.description: Draw your own constellations on a seed-based star field.
apps.longDescription: Cosmographe lets you draw your own constellations on a seed-based star field. Connect stars, name your constellations, and share your celestial maps. Each seed generates a unique sky with deterministic star positions.
features: Share via URL (seed and drawings encoded)
Glassmorphism HUD with film grain aesthetic

apps.name: Council of Steves
apps.subtitle: Every gull is Steve
apps.description: Every gull is Steve. A procedural SVG bird generator.
apps.longDescription: Council of Steves is a procedural SVG bird generator where every gull is named Steve. Generate unique seagulls with distinct colors, poses, and personalities. Save your favorite Steves, export them as SVG, and share them.
features: Procedural SVG bird generation with deterministic seeds

apps.name: Days Since
apps.subtitle: A quiet place to measure time
apps.description: A quiet place to measure time. Track days since or until life events.
apps.longDescription: Days Since is a minimalist time tracking app. Count the days since or until meaningful life events. Add personal milestones, see how much time has passed. Clean interface, local storage, no account needed.
features: Track days since or until events
Recurring events: daily, weekly, monthly, yearly
Detailed time breakdowns (years, months, weeks, days)
Custom colors and icons per event

apps.name: Dice Roller
apps.subtitle: Provably fair dice for tabletop RPGs
apps.description: Dice roller for tabletop RPGs. Rich notation parser, roll history, and provably fair verification.
apps.longDescription: Dice Roller is a professional dice rolling app for tabletop RPGs. Rich notation parser supports keep/drop, rerolls, sorting, and tags. Full roll history with provably fair SHA-256 verification. Multilingual (EN/FR), multiple themes.

apps.name: dot365
apps.subtitle: A year in 365 dots
apps.description: Interactive time visualization — a year in points.
apps.longDescription: dot365 is an interactive time visualization that represents a full year as 365 points. Each dot marks a day, filling in as the year progresses. Watch time take shape, reflect on the days behind and ahead.
features: 6 time scales: year, month, week, day, hour, minute
Interactive dot grid with hover tooltips
Collapsible stats bar with passed/remaining counts

apps.name: Dune of Sidonia
apps.subtitle: Procedural desert landscapes inspired by Moebius
apps.description: Procedural desert landscape generator inspired by Moebius and Dune. Nine named palettes, binary suns, shooting stars.
apps.longDescription: Dune of Sidonia is a procedural desert landscape generator inspired by the art of Moebius and the world of Dune. Nine named color palettes, binary suns, shooting stars, and layered terrain create unique contemplative scenes. Shareable via URL.
features: Binary suns and shooting star animations
Export as PNG with customizable message overlays

apps.name: Grid4
apps.subtitle: Minimalist 4x4 puzzle card game
apps.description: Minimalist 4x4 puzzle game inspired by Cards +1. Increment cards to form matching groups, manage limited action points.
apps.longDescription: Grid4 is a minimalist 4x4 puzzle game inspired by Cards +1. Tap cards to increment their values and form matching groups of 4 or more. Manage limited action points to keep the game going. Simple rules, deep strategy.
features: Match 4+ identical adjacent cards to score
Customizable color palettes (Default, Pastel, Neon, Ocean)

apps.name: Growing Everyday
apps.subtitle: A digital garden growing in real time
apps.description: A digital garden growing in real time. One new flower per year since 2023, each taking 365 days to fully bloom.
apps.longDescription: Growing Everyday is a digital garden that grows in real time. One new flower appears each year since 2023, and each flower takes a full 365 days to bloom completely. Watch your garden evolve day by day.
features: One new flower per year since 2023
365-day bloom cycle with ease-in growth curves

apps.name: Kao-Z
apps.subtitle: Japanese-inspired avatar generator
apps.description: Japanese-inspired avatar generator with 828 SVG elements across 12 categories. 5-channel color system, URL sharing, PNG/SVG export.
apps.longDescription: Kao-Z is a Japanese-inspired avatar generator with 828 hand-crafted SVG elements across 12 categories. Customize faces, hair, eyes, accessories, and more with a 5-channel color system. Share via compact binary URL encoding, or export as PNG or SVG.
features: Position controls: X/Y offset, zoom, closeup mode
9 avatar save slots with local persistence
Export as PNG (multiple sizes) or SVG

apps.name: Keyb60
apps.subtitle: 60-second typing speed test
apps.description: A typewriter-themed 60-second typing speed test with real-time WPM, accuracy tracking and virtual keyboard.
apps.longDescription: Keyb60 is a typewriter-themed 60-second typing speed test. Measure your words per minute and accuracy in real time with a virtual keyboard overlay. Clean retro aesthetic, instant feedback, no distractions.
features: Keychron K2 virtual keyboard with key press feedback
Multiple keyboard color schemes (Carbon, Frost, Military, Cherry)
Mechanical keypress sounds with volume control
Share results via native share or clipboard

apps.name: Marvel Archive
apps.subtitle: The Marvel Comics catalog, year by year
apps.description: Unofficial archive of 30,000+ Marvel Comics issues, 3,900+ series, and 4,300+ creators (1965-2025).
apps.longDescription: Marvel Archive is an unofficial static archive cataloging 30,000+ Marvel Comics issues, 3,900+ series, and 4,300+ creators from 1965 to 2025. Browse by year, series, or creator. Full-text search powered by Pagefind. Data sourced from the defunct Marvel Developer API, preserved for research and educational purposes.
features: Browse by year, series, or creator
Data from the defunct Marvel Developer API

apps.name: NEON:GEN
apps.subtitle: Evangelion-style episode title cards
apps.description: Generate Evangelion-style episode title cards. Type, customize, and export.
apps.longDescription: NEON:GEN is an Episode Title Card Output System. Generate Evangelion-style title cards with custom text, colors, and typography. Perfect for social media, video intros, or just for fun.
features: Episode title customization: Japanese (kanji/kana) and English
Authentic Evangelion aesthetic with NERV branding and hazard stripes

apps.name: Nexus
apps.subtitle: Tile-based strategy game for two
apps.description: Tile-based strategy game for two players. Build networks, place nodes, and connect edges to win.
apps.longDescription: Nexus is a tile-based strategy game for two players. Build networks by placing nodes and connecting edges on a shared board. Outmaneuver your opponent by creating longer chains and controlling key positions. Simple rules, deep strategy.
features: Two-player turn-based tile placement on 7x9 grid
80-tile shared bag: 20 nodes and 60 flux tiles
Directional port system (North, East, South, West)
Nodes can override opponent flux tiles
Victory by connecting your edge to the opposite side

apps.name: Orbital Drift
apps.subtitle: Sci-fi landscapes with ambient radio
apps.description: Procedural sci-fi landscape generator with ambient radio, CRT effects, and a space cockpit HUD.
apps.longDescription: Orbital Drift is a procedural sci-fi landscape generator featuring ambient radio, CRT visual effects, and a space cockpit HUD overlay. Generate contemplative alien vistas, listen to ambient frequencies, and lose yourself in procedural worlds. Shareable via URL.
features: CRT scanlines and HUD overlay effects

apps.name: PokeCodex
apps.subtitle: Interactive Pokedex powered by PokeAPI
apps.description: Interactive PokeCodex powered by PokeAPI. Browse, search, and discover all Pokemon with stats, types, abilities, and evolutions.
apps.longDescription: PokeCodex is an interactive Pokedex powered by PokeAPI. Browse, search, and discover all Pokemon with detailed stats, types, abilities, and evolution chains. Filter by generation, type, or name. Clean interface, fast search, works offline.
features: Browse all Pokemon with infinite scroll
Search by name or number with autocomplete
Filter by type (single or dual type)
Detailed view: stats, evolution chain, type matchups, abilities

apps.name: Radial Clock
apps.subtitle: Time as concentric rings
apps.description: A radial clock that visualizes time as concentric rings, from fast cycles to slow cycles.
apps.longDescription: Radial Clock is a visualization of time as concentric rings. Seven rings display seconds, minutes, hours, day of week, week, month, and year progress. Interactive tooltips on hover, bilingual interface (EN/FR), theme switching.

apps.name: Seedmoji
apps.subtitle: Deterministic ASCII avatar generator
apps.description: Deterministic ASCII avatar generator. Same seed, same face. Always. No API, no storage, works offline.
apps.longDescription: Seedmoji is a deterministic ASCII avatar generator. Enter any seed and get a unique face rendered from text characters. Same seed always produces the same face. No API calls, no storage, everything runs locally.
features: Deterministic: same seed always produces the same face
First character of seed becomes the avatar's mouth
Export as PNG (multiple sizes) or SVG
SVG API endpoint for direct integration

apps.name: SpinEat
apps.subtitle: Spin the wheel, choose your meal
apps.description: An interactive roulette wheel to choose your next meal. Why decide when fate can do it for you?
apps.longDescription: SpinEat is an interactive roulette wheel to help you choose your next meal. Add your favorite restaurants, cuisines, or dishes, spin the wheel, and let fate decide. Customizable options, smooth animations.
features: Customizable food options with emoji and color
Direct Google Maps link to nearby restaurants

apps.name: Star Wars Avatar
apps.subtitle: Star Wars character creator
apps.description: Star Wars avatar creator with dynamic SVG composition, multi-layer color system, and URL sharing. 4 species, hundreds of options.
apps.longDescription: Star Wars Avatar is a character creator with dynamic SVG composition, a multi-layer color system, and URL sharing. Choose from 4 species and hundreds of customization options across face, hair, accessories, and outfits. Share via URL or export as image.
features: Gender selection with unique options per species

apps.name: Star Wars Countdown
apps.subtitle: Sci-fi countdown timer
apps.description: A Star Wars countdown timer with a sci-fi target reticle visualization.
apps.longDescription: Star Wars Countdown is a countdown timer with a sci-fi target reticle visualization inspired by the Star Wars universe. Set your countdown, watch the reticle animate, and feel the tension build.
features: Target reticle with randomized edge patterns
Countdown timer to selected Star Wars dates
